steps.title: Spot the coordinated verbs
steps.content: The relative clause links two verbs with and: "which typically are woven from sumac... and ______ bold colors." Both verbs share the plural subject which (referring to baskets).

steps.title: Apply the parallel verb structure rule
steps.content:
Verbs joined by and must be parallel in tense and agree with their shared subject. Are woven is present tense, plural — the blank must match.

A) feature — present tense, plural; parallel to "are woven" and agrees with the plural subject. Correct.
B) had featured — past-perfect; shifts tense and contradicts the present-tense context. Wrong.
C) were featuring — past-progressive; wrong tense. Wrong.
D) featured — simple past; breaks the present-tense parallel. Wrong.

A is correct.
